docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $950.00 FILED BY TOLBERT ORLANDO AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-27-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
INVALID POS AS TO JOHN SMITH, NO MAILING DONE ON SUBSERVICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-27-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-14-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOLBERT ORLANDO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SMITH JOHN DEFECTIVE SERVICE IS WAIVED BY DEFT. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SUSTAIN BURDEN OF PROOF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
